title: Add 'buildah version' command
body: Added "buildah version" command following the same format as "docker version" and "kpod version"

comments.body: I fixed the issue and signed the commit.
One of the files is a binary buildah file.  I don't think we want that in this commit.
OH FUDGE!  I didn't meant to close this, just comment on it.
oh right, buildah appeared while I was testing. Should I just delete the file or is there another way to do it?

Hopefully
cd to your sandbox
git rm buildah
git commit --amend -s

Then the normal fetch and push stuff as appropriate.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/63ca9028bc8b05a4d4e969d0c1a6b689c7abeb61.1498579242127431424/index.html)
